mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.product_name, w.target_qty FROM production_result r JOIN work_order w ON r.order_id = w.order_id JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, p.product_name, w.target_qty FROM production_result r JOIN work_order w ON r.order_id = w.order_id JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.result_id = #{resultId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production_result (order_id, good_qty, defect_qty, defect_type, worker, result_date) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{goodQty}, #{defectQty}, #{defectType}, #{worker}, #{resultDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE production_result SET good_qty = #{goodQty}, defect_qty = #{defectQty}, defect_type = #{defectType}, worker = #{worker}, result_date = #{resultDate} WHERE result_id = #{resultId}
